preferredDeck: Google OAuth now runs natively in Freed Desktop, Friends graph motion stays lighter, Settings and Map stay smoother, and background story checks back off sooner under high memory
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
editorialNotes: Approved after v26.5.1016-dev failed before packaging, then refreshed for v26.5.1101-dev after the dense Map movement paint fix landed, v26.5.1102-dev after the Settings moving chrome paint fix landed, v26.5.1103-dev after the renderer hidden timer telemetry cleanup landed, v26.5.1104-dev after the Friends graph recovery fix landed, v26.5.1105-dev after native Google Contacts and Drive OAuth landed, v26.5.1106-dev after resident WebKit memory was added to social scrape gating, v26.5.1107-dev after social scrape memory preflight moved before shared session acquisition, v26.5.1108-dev after hidden Friends provider labels stopped repainting during graph motion, v26.5.1109-dev after social scraper resident RSS started using the high-memory budget, and v26.5.1110-dev after optional story scraping began respecting resident memory pressure.
